name: pi-openai-responses-codex
description: Standalone pi extension package that clones pi's built-in openai-responses transport into a self-contained, modifiable, publishable provider.
author: rao

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/transport/openai-responses.js && node --check src/transport/openai-responses-shared.js && node --check src/transport/simple-options.js && node --check src/transport/transform-messages.js && node --check src/utils/error-body.js && node --check src/utils/estimate.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:syntax && npm run pack:check
